name: multi-llm-convergence-beta
description: (beta/experimental) Host-agnostic, N-model variant of multi-llm-convergence. Drives any artifact (plan, PRD, design doc, spec, or implementation diff) to cross-model consensus from Claude, Codex, Gemini, or another capable host by rotating multiple built-in reviewer families through one uniform read-only reviewer protocol. Uses hard preflight, local-only source grounding, liveness supervision, per-round commits, a full clean-cycle convergence rule, and no user-provided command adapters. Ships parallel to multi-llm-convergence (untouched) until promotion.
